seoTitle: Wye vs Wynn Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wye and Wynn Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wye vs Wynn Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wye and Wynn Vale.
heading: Wye vs Wynn Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wye, South Australia and Wynn Vale, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wynn Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wye (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wye or Wynn Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wye has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Wynn Vale scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wye scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Wynn Vale scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wye or Wynn Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wynn Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
